files.description: Dev environment stabilization (QA configs to dev), Storybook and V2 migration complete, Contentful integration tomorrow, roaster data flow pivoting to RCC-direct-to-Contentful, Claude Code as primary dev tool, Hotjar for surveys (exit survey review pending), and intelligence platform demo with data sources walkthrough.
files.title: Project Feral Standup: Dev Progress

files.description: Vendor data flow decided (Americano DynamoDB, not PIM), component library guardrails and 80% code coverage baseline, survey tool evaluation ongoing, and Prasanna's Databricks import complete.

files.description: AB testing hybrid model confirmed (Contentful + Blueconic), dev onboarding session planned for tomorrow, team moving from prototype to Storybook, personalization engine evaluation underway, and vendor data architecture documentation shared with Rishab.
files.title: Project Feral Standup: Progress Update

files.description: Beans frontend repo demo with agentic dev capabilities, hybrid XPS React component library, Storybook integration, V2 branch strategy, 80% code coverage achieved.

files.description: AI-first dev infrastructure onboarded, Contentful integration underway, collection naming conventions debated, page-wise development approach confirmed, and agent-readiness identified as new requirement.

files.description: Page-wise development approach confirmed, Contentful integration progressing, AEO/GEO investigation underway, email strategy alignment needed, and CommerceTools recurring payments being evaluated.

files.title: Project Feral Standup: Contentful & AEO Progress

files.description: AEO/GEO analysis reveals site needs significant agentic interaction improvements, Hotjar evaluated as preferred survey tool, Contentful pages now rendering with hybrid approach in progress, and churn analysis advancing.

files.description: Storybook prototype deadline April 6, Hotjar selected at $36K, CMS migration and redesign parallel tracks, milestone planning needed.

files.description: APIs targeted for sprint-end readiness, Storybook prototyping in progress, branching strategy published, and experimentation framework planning underway.

files.title: Project Feral Standup: Budget & CMS Walkthrough

files.title: Project Feral Standup: AEM Contract & Email Progress

files.description: PDP concepts approved, segmentation strategy unblocked with Jennifer workshop, AEM decommissioned from roster detail, dataset dashboards demonstrated, OpenClaw security discussion.
files.title: Project Feral Standup: Dataset Dashboards & Segmentation

files.description: Meeting cadence reduced to twice weekly, personalization three-layer solution finalized, Contentful demo next week, subscription CT postponed post-August, AB testing blocked until June/July.
files.title: Project Feral Standup: Cadence, Personalization & Contentful
